from __future__ import annotations

def large_dict_literal_response_in_handler_positive():
    def handler():
        return {
            "id": 7,
            "name": "metrics",
            "status": "ok",
            "owner": "ops",
            "region": "us-east",
            "priority": "p1",
            "team": "platform",
            "version": "2026.04",
            "rollout": "stable",
            "notes": "inline giant response body",
        }

    return handler
